    A

    AbstractDAO<T> - Class in dataAccess
    A generic Data Access Object (DAO) that provides common CRUD operations for any type T.
    AbstractDAO() - Constructor for class dataAccess.AbstractDAO
    Constructs an AbstractDAO and infers the generic type T using reflection.
    addButton - Variable in class presentation.ClientView
     
    addButton - Variable in class presentation.OrderView
     
    addButton - Variable in class presentation.ProductView
     
    addClient(Client) - Method in class businessLayer.ClientBLL
    Adds a new client after validating required fields.
    address - Variable in class model.Client
     
    Address - Class in model
    Represents an Address entity containing details such as ID, street name, street number, city, and judet .
    Address(int, String, int, String, String) - Constructor for class model.Address
    Constructs an Address with all its details.
    addressDAO - Variable in class presentation.ClientController
     
    AddressDAO - Class in dataAccess
    DAO class for managing Address records in the database.
    AddressDAO() - Constructor for class dataAccess.AddressDAO
     
    addressId - Variable in class model.Client
